connect.evaluationform.evaluationformsin: Information about the automation configuration in single select questions. Automation options are evaluated in order, and the first matched option is applied. If no automation option matches, and there is a default option, then the default option is applied.

connect.evaluationform.evaluationformsin.Description: The identifier of the default answer option, when none of the automation options match the criteria.
connect.evaluationform.evaluationformsin.Length Constraints: Minimum length of 1\. Maximum length of 40\.

connect.evaluationform.evaluationformsin.Description: The automation options of the single select question.
